flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Baltimore City Community College are 19% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($36.0k vs $44.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Baltimore City Community College fell 38% between 2006 and 2009 (7.3% → 4.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Baltimore City Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 3.7k).
